title: taraxacum stenolepium
intro: Taraxacum stenolepium, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion or Russian dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its narrow leaves and yellow flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum stenolepium include reducing inflammation and improving liver function, as well as supporting digestive health and reducing the risk of certain diseases. Taraxacum stenolepium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some Eastern European and Asian cuisines.
